'''Alta Ranga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ensel]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Master Ranga was present at the opening [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] of the conflict on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Alta Ranga was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Serving the Order for many decades, Ranga was of advanced age and supported himself with a simple cane when he walked.<ref name="AOAOTC" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] that had plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] for years brought the Republic to its knees. Several thousand star systems began leaving the Republic, many of them joining the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], led by the former Jedi Master [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. When Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] discovered that the Confederacy was building a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|army]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], he was taken captive along with [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was given emergency powers by the Senate, and commissioned a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. As Jedi [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] went to [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to recruit an army of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] that Kenobi had earlier discovered the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]] had been secretly building for the Republic, Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] assembled a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|strike team]]<ref name="Episode II">{{Film|II}}</ref> of two hundred Jedi<ref name="Dead and Alive Jedi list">{{Blog|holocron|10|Jedi Casualties: Battle of Geonosis}}</ref> to rescue the captives on Geonosis. Joining the task force, Master Ranga helped storm the [[Petranaki arena]] and pit his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] against the [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] of the Confederate Army.<ref name="Episode II" />

Alta fought bravely with the wisdom of his old age, somewhere in the arena. Many Jedi fell to the overwhelming force of rapidly-firing droids, and a survivor's circle started forming in the center of the arena. As the droids ceased firing, Count Dooku, observing the melee from above, called on the Jedi to surrender. Windu refused, and as the Jedi again raised their lightsabers, the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] army arrived, landing in and outside of the arena in [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]]. A [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] ensued between Republic and Separatist forces, initiating the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Episode II" /> While Ranga did not make it to the survivors' circle, he was able to survive the fight and return to the Jedi Temple to prepare for the militarization of the Order.<ref name="Dead and Alive Jedi list" />

==Behind the scenes==
Alta was designed by [[Dermot Power]] and slated to appear in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], but did not make it to the final cut. He was, however, revealed to the world in concept art in the ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones]]'' book,<ref name="AOAOTC" /> and as an unpainted concept-maquette in ''[[Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop]]''.<ref name="Sculpting">''[[Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop]]''</ref>
